name_en: 👄FENDI New Iconic Baguette Medium Bag, grey houndstooth wool material, featuring FF embroidery pattern. With same-color leather details and an FF buckle. Features a front flap, magnetic snap, lined interior compartment, zip pocket, and gold metal hardware. The bag comes with a detachable handle and shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody. Model: FD6221, FD8600, Size: 27*6*15cm
